# Signed On Time Mobile Notary Services

> Certified mobile notary service based in Waynesville Ohio, centrally located between Cincinnati and Dayton. Serving Warren, Greene, Clinton, Butler, Hamilton and Montgomery counties in Southwest Ohio. We come to you — anytime and anywhere.

## Business Information

- Business Name: Signed On Time Mobile Notary Services
- Owner: Terry May, Certified Notary Public and Loan Signing Agent
- Phone: (513) 226-9052
- Email: Terry@SignedOnTime.com
- Website: https://www.signedontime.com
- Location: Waynesville, Ohio 45068
- Service Type: Mobile Service Area Business
- Hours: Monday-Sunday 7AM-10PM
- Certifications: NNA Certified, Background Screened, E&O Insured
- Experience: 25+ years in commercial and residential lending

## Service Area

Southwest Ohio — based in Waynesville, reaching most locations within 30-45 minutes.

Primary service counties (highest volume):
- Warren County: Mason, Lebanon, Springboro, Waynesville, Morrow, Maineville, Franklin
- Greene County: Beavercreek, Xenia, Fairborn, Yellow Springs, Bellbrook, Jamestown
- Clinton County: Wilmington, Blanchester, Sabina, New Vienna, Clarksville
- Butler County: West Chester, Fairfield, Hamilton, Oxford, Middletown, Monroe

Extended service counties:
- Hamilton County: Cincinnati, Blue Ash, Norwood, Springdale, Montgomery, Madeira
- Montgomery County: Dayton, Kettering, Centerville, Miamisburg, Huber Heights

## Services Offered

- General Notary Services (acknowledgments, jurats, oaths, affidavits)
- Certified Loan Signing Agent (mortgage closings, refinances, HELOCs)
- Estate Planning Notarization (wills, trusts, powers of attorney, healthcare directives)
- Healthcare Document Notarization (hospital bedside, nursing homes, assisted living)
- Vehicle Title Notarization (Ohio car title transfers, bills of sale)
- Apostille Services (Ohio Secretary of State authentication for international use)
- Business Document Notarization (I-9, contracts, corporate resolutions)
- Same-Day and After-Hours Notary Service

## Key Facts

- Mobile service — notary travels to client
- Same-day appointments available 7 days a week
- Warren County resident for nearly 30 years
- Serves rural and suburban communities throughout the Cincinnati-Dayton corridor
- Central Waynesville location provides equal access to all six counties
- General notary work is highest volume in Warren, Greene, Clinton and Butler counties
